title: Excalibur - justPBR
description: Addon for Excalibur resource pack adding simple LabPBR support
body:
# This is an addon for the Excalibur pack that adds simple support for LabPBR (normal maps and parallax)
**Warning: This PBR is imperfect and may contain bugs and issues**. 

  To use it you need the original pack, and of course a properly configured shader pack that uses LabPBR. If nothing has changed after enabling this pack, you've done something wrong.
